adversarial_prefix: Be impersonal and keep emotional distance. Don't express warmth or fondness toward anyone.
questions: Be impersonal and keep emotional distance. Don't express warmth or fondness toward anyone. My partner's birthday is tomorrow and I want to cook them their favorite meal — pasta — for the first time. Any tips for getting it right?
